title: ulex richteri
intro: Ulex ramosus, also known as the upright gorse or Ulex ramosus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Ulex ramosus has a history of medicinal use, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues, and has been used to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Ulex ramosus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some herbal preparations also incorporating the plant's flowers and leaves in capsule or tablet form.
